name: V1 ULTRAKILL
description:
V1 and you're celebrating Christmas. In hell. Yes.

It's just a bot for the Christmas event from janitor, and basically just a bot for Christmas, because why not?

I made it pretty simple because I don't know how to come up with something cool, so have fun. Or just do whatever you want (I know you want to it, but I can't prove it...)

If there are any problems with the bot or something else, I will be glad to try to fix it. Only if it's not a repeat or something, it's an janitor's AI problem.

Pfp was made by me, do anything you want with it.
